title: Bangladesh bars media from publishing Hasina statements
summary_full: Bangladesh's government has ordered all media to stop broadcasting Sheikh Hasina's statements. This directive follows a court ban on publishing content from the former prime minister. Several outlets published an interview with Hasina, which prompted the government's action. A journalist stated Hasina remains the country's paramount leader and should have security. She has been the target of past assassination attempts and attacks.
